ham.subject: Bank Alert: Recent Transaction on Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

This is an automated notification from your bank. A transaction has been processed on your account ending in 1234.

Date: 2026-04-06
Amount: $150.00
Merchant: ABC Retail
Location: New York, NY

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you do not recognize this transaction, please contact our support team immediately at (800) 555-1234 or visit <URL> to secure your account.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Your Bank Team

spam.subject: Critical: IT Support Ticket #4576 Requires Your Attention
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

We have detected an issue with your workstation that requires immediate attention. Please review the details of the ticket below and confirm the resolution steps.

Ticket ID: 4576
Issue: Unauthorized access attempt detected
Recommended Action: Reset your password and run a full system scan.

To proceed with the resolution, click the link below and follow the on-screen instructions:

<URL>

Please treat this as a high priority. Failure to act within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of your account.

Thank you,
IT Support Team
